lines.text: No longer shall you bear these thorns as a reminder. Forged from primordial seas... this crown shall grant a new identity.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Fleurdelys. Child of Divinity. The Immaculate One. Will you uphold the sacred teachings of the Order of the Deep?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Salvation. Unity. Ascension... Of these three doctrines, which do you choose?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: In the name of Divinity, I bestow upon you this crown. May the blood of justice never run dry.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Through this sacred rite, you become the bridge between the heavens and the living.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: From this day forward, you shall be the Master's sole receiver and herald.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: None but the Master shall ever have the right to command you to bend the knee.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
